name: GD Requests
description: Manage your viewer level request queue in-game. Browse requests, jump to levels, remove/ban/mark as played -- all without leaving GD. Pairs with gdrequests.org.

creator-token.name: Creator Token
creator-token.description: Your token from gdrequests.org -- find it on the Geode Integration page of your dashboard.

open-youtube.name: Open YouTube Showcases
open-youtube.description: Show a YT button on requests that include a showcase video. Clicking it opens the video in your browser.

show-toast.name: Now Playing
show-toast.description: Show a notification when you enter a level from your queue, displaying who requested it.

open-queue-keybind.name: Open Queue Hotkey
open-queue-keybind.description: Press this key anywhere in GD to open your request queue.

black-screen-keybind.name: Black screen toggle hotkey
black-screen-keybind.description: Good if you get nsfw jumpscared you press that to make gameplay black for your account safety lol (made by MalikHw47)

hide-black-btn.name: Hide Black Screen Button
hide-black-btn.description: Hide the button entirely if you're not streaming and don't need it.

always-show-black-btn.name: Always Show Black Screen Button
always-show-black-btn.description: Show the black screen toggle button during gameplay on all platforms, not just mobile, maybe windows on touchscreen?

black-btn-position.name: Black Screen Button Position
black-btn-position.description: Where to place the black screen toggle button during gameplay.

black-btn-size.name: Black Screen Button Size
black-btn-size.description: Size of the black screen toggle button during gameplay (in pixels).
